title: The Last Sword You Will Ever Need Reboot
description: Adds a sword that will one hit kill the Ender Dragon. 'Nuff said
body:
Description

Development on this instance of the mod has ended, for a 1.20 version and other future developments, check out [The Last Sword You Never Forgot](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-last-sword-you-never-forgot)
 
This mod adds a sword that will kill nearly anything in one hit. The sword is a universal harvester for all destructible blocks.

To start off you need to kill the ender dragon. It will drop some dragon crystals.

Next, you need to craft those into dragon gems, that's a 3x3 grid filled with crystals.

Then you can use two of those for the blade and the ender dragon egg for a handle to craft the Dragon Sword Tier 0. To upgrade any tier just surround it with dragon gems in the crafting table.

Oh, and there's also an armor set with a full set effect buff.
